name: cinatra-foundation
description: Cinatra public foundation Claude Code plugin — the 5 shared environment skills (setup, onboarding, cinatra-dev-tools, extension-conventions, domain-gotchas) plus the deterministic dev-tools CLI engine they shell out to. Install once; skills activate on natural-language triggers. Apache-2.0.

x-cinatra-dev-tools._comment: Opt-in marker read GENERICALLY by the dev-tools plugin-update engine (bin/lib/plugin-updates.cjs): any installed plugin whose manifest sets update=true is discovered at runtime as a first-party update target. Set hold=true (or pin a version) to exclude a copy from auto-updates.
